positive: Minimalist silhouette of a mountain peak framed by abstract, glowing crescent moons and celestial constellations, rendered in a deep navy blue and electric teal ink wash style, with crisp, defined lines suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. The composition is perfectly centered, emphasizing negative space around the main mountain silhouette. Style should evoke celestial travel and quiet adventure. Clean, high contrast, geometric abstraction, dotwork and solid color blocking.
